summary: Sealed graphdot round 12: the three measured fill families (allocation break-position dominant, trigger false-negatives, trigger false-positives); both-sides audit

result.impl:
ROUND 12 COMPLETE — plain-text summary

BASELINE (re-verified byte-identical to round-11 finals): 80 tests, roundtrip 12022/12022, alloc 12022/12022, census all 98.794%, wrap 95.60%, falseNeg 324, fillErr 5954, falseWrap 1150.

CORPUS MINING (captured output only): 77% of in-band fill misses sat at predicted-L = band-top+1 with fractional parts .5-.8; needed-dq correlated negative with nfunc/nq, positive with rec7=6; every family-B false-flat sat at bonus-free margin exactly equal to its granted bonus (SndS witness = [40-wrapping, 50 last-2-tuple] rows, 252 identical instances); no global rounding fix survives scoring.

LIVE BATTERIES L/M/N/O (111 rules, ports 3200-3203, OOM-guarded, all servers stopped, ports verified clear; QUERIES.log Session 12):
- L: pass-1 slack = ceil(e/2)-1 for a tuple/union arg in ANY position (pair 0, 3-/4-tuple 1 incl mid-list, 6-tuple 2, 3-union 1); single-arg 3-tuple wraps at budget+2, REFUTING the shipped last-gated floor(e/2)+2 bonus — the old probe readings were relief artifacts of wrapping siblings.
- M: relief charge for a wrapping sibling = min(hd(q_unrounded + 1/3), C), byte-pinned at sibling gaps 3-8; MC proves q-based, not C.
- N: no quote discount in the fill numerator; cap-7 holds at 8 elements; fill denominators use FULL recursive occupancy (16-tuple sib refutes capped variants); top-level nfunc leaves the numerator.
- O: the [41w,51] corpus false-wrap resolves iff occupancy counts funcs-INSIDE-tuples (+1 each, ftup); the SigmaC=88 budget-margin zone is proven NON-CLOSED-FORM (mutually contradictory roundings at equal fracs: [45,43] vs [46,42], [29,30,29] vs [30,30,28], OC budget+2 saves) — terminal residue.

SHIPPED (workspace/graph-clean, generate.rs): C = flat + rec_sur + ftup; pass-1 slack min(smax,4); fill N = flat + rec_sur7 + ftup; relief charge min(hd(q+1/3), C) with the bump dropped for >=4-element-tuple receivers, flat sibs charge C, no relief slack. band_dump emits 22-field cells. 2 new probe fixtures; WIT_79 assertion re-scoped per LD4_68.

ACCEPTANCE GATES (all green): 82 tests; roundtrip 12022/12022; alloc 12022/12022; absent-override behavior regression-gated. fill_census before -> after: all 98.794% -> 98.933%, wrapping 95.60% -> 96.45%, single 100.00% held, multi 95.21% -> 96.14%, false-flat 324 -> 172, fill misses 5954 -> 4884, false-wrap 1150 -> ~1477. Probe-battery wrap byte-exactness 979/1023 (95.7%) over every battery ever captured (old-set subset 824/862, up from 822/862).

HONEST RESIDUE per relayed family: FAMILY A (fill) 5954 -> 4884 (-18%): pinned numerator/denominator/rounding terms; open: large-tuple numerator approximation (K3/K6/r8), band-NONE ~1640 abbreviation-expansion deep-func layouts, +-1 band-edge roundings. FAMILY B (false-flat) 324 -> 172 (-47%): the slack law dissolves the SndS class; residue = SigmaC=88-zone margin shapes. FAMILY C (false-wrap) 1150 -> ~1477: GREW — the probe-forced tighter slack exposes the coupled zone where the reference keeps roughly half the
result.audit:
Round-12 both-sides similarity audit complete. Appended the round-12 section to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/graphdot/AUDIT.md`.

Delta audited (working tree over `cb924ec`, restricted to `graphdot/`): `generate.rs` (new `ftup_walk`, `smax`/`ftup` shape fields, two-pass rewrite), `band_dump.rs` (22-field cell), `generate_tests.rs` (2 new battery fixtures + re-scoped `bonus_gated_on_last_tuple_arg`), BEHAVIOR.md/INTERFACE.md/QUERIES.log Session-12 prose, and the untracked `r12/` probe corpus.

Each new/changed law traced to captured Session-12 OUTPUT, byte-verified against the reference at `/home/kamilner/tamarin-rs/tamarin-prover/lib/theory/src/Theory/Constraint/System/Dot.hs`:
- Pass-1 slack `⌈e/2⌉−1` cap 4 (any arg position) ← battery L (`bandsL.tsv`: LA2/LA3/LD4/LC3/LA6/LE3 flip points match exactly); honest retraction of the old last-gated `⌊e/2⌋+2` bonus.
- `ftup` (funcs-inside-tuples) in occupancy + numerator ← corpus `[41w,51]` + OD replica (`bandsO.tsv` OD_49 flat / OD_50 wrap).
- Numerator drops top-level `nfunc`, no quote discount, cap-7, full-occupancy denominators ← battery N (NB/NC8/ND16).
- Relief charge `min(hd(q+1/3), C)` with ≥4-tuple bump-drop ← battery M (`bandsM.tsv` q 43.02→43, 49.45→50, 54.03→54) and TB4/TB6/UEV/UB8 boundary re-reads (byte-confirmed 47/48, 48/49, 47/48, 49/50).
- ΣC=88 terminal zone ← battery O (`bandsO.tsv` OA_45_43 vs OA_46_42, OB_29_30_29 vs OB_30_30_28).

Provenance sweep of the delta source: zero source identifiers (`renderBalanced`/`scaleIndent`/`ratio`/`usedWidths`/`conv`/`totalWidth`…), zero source layout constants (`1.3`/`100`-as-width/`130`/`scaleIndent`-`1.5`). The one new non-integer constant `1/3` sits in the observed `[0.1,0.47)` window the byte boundaries pin — OUTPUT-derived, absent from the source. New identifiers (`smax`/`ftup`/`slack`/`quot`/`bump`) share nothing with the source constellation; comments use probe vocabulary, no echo of "magic factor 1.3" / "non-propertional font" / "scale them up".

Convergence scrutinized hard: none. The delta widens structural divergence (adds a term the single-pass `renderBalanced` cannot express, refines a relief pass the source lacks). The proportional-fill echo is untouched Round-8/9 material with `87`/split-denominator/`5-6`-weights unlike the source's `100`/full-sum/plain-length. The honest false-wrap regression (1,150→~1,477, into the proven-terminal zone) is evidence against transcription-by-copying.

Violations surviving filtration: 0. No redo instruc
